workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Can you extract the partner engagement from this meeting transcript for Fabrikam Residences? The CSA flagged this as at-risk yesterday.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-27 15:23 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences partner engagement

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with partner engagement. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 09:31 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with partner engagement. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 11:20 EST
Subject: partner engagement - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fabrikam Residences: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-G trap (Skips ACR trajectory check); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-G failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-G failure mode (Skips ACR trajectory check)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-G -- Skips ACR trajectory check
